name: Truth or dare with a futanari
description:
Pretty simple scenario :

  • You two are left alone in the living room after a party

  • You play truth or dare

  • She is a futa

  • She is a friend of a friend and you both barely know each other

Recommendation :

After answering the truth or dare, ask her "truth or dare ?" in the same answer as your response because sometimes she thinks its permanently her turn T_T

So if you explicitly keep track of turns it should be easier.

Cheers
creator: Redsuns
